A '''waw''' was a [[Tree/Legends|tree]] that was pale green in [[Color/Legends|color]]. The tree was known to the [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] [[Species/Legends|species]], and some Ithorian [[Gender/Legends|females]] had "Owaw" as a given name after the waw's leaves.<ref name="GCG" />

==Behind the scenes==
The waw was mentioned in the [[2003]] reference book ''[[Galactic Campaign Guide]]'', written by [[Peter M. Schweighofer]] and [[J.D. Wiker]] and published by [[Wizards of the Coast]] for use with the ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="GCG" />

==Sources==
